scripts.setup: npm run ver && node scripts/setup.js && npm install && npm run set-version
scripts.build: npm run ver && npm run set-version && vue-cli-service build && npm run zipper
scripts.build:playbuz: npm run ver && npm run set-version && vue-cli-service build --mode playbuz && npm run zipper
scripts.build:playbuz-jp: npm run ver && npm run set-version && vue-cli-service build --mode playbuz-jp && npm run zipper
scripts.build:playbuz-tw-qa: npm run ver && npm run set-version && vue-cli-service build --mode playbuz-tw-qa
scripts.build:playbuz-tw-production: npm run ver && npm run set-version && vue-cli-service build --mode playbuz-tw-production
scripts.build:playbuz-jp-qa: npm run ver && npm run set-version && vue-cli-service build --mode playbuz-jp-qa
scripts.build:playbuz-jp-production: npm run ver && npm run set-version && vue-cli-service build --mode playbuz-jp-production
scripts.tag: git tag -l | xargs git tag -d && echo 'delete local tag finish'
scripts.tag:remote: (git tag -l | xargs -n 1 git push --delete origin && echo 'delete remote tag finish') && git fetch
